use_cases: Hero section with immersive 3D animated background for landing pages
Visual enhancement for creative portfolios and showcase pages
Interactive brand experiences with embedded Spline 3D content
ai_summary: A minimalist wrapper component that embeds an interactive Spline 3D scene in a dark-themed full-screen container. The component uses an iframe to display the remote 3D content with a rounded border and shadow, making it suitable for hero sections or landing pages that require immersive visual experiences. Simple atomic component designed for drop-in usage.
